question: ไม่เห็นมีอะไรน่ากินสักอย่าง
answer: ที่ The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi ชั้น G โซนฟู้ดคอร์ทมีอาหารหลากหลายมากค่ะ <break/> ทั้งอาหารอีสานที่ร้านตำกระชูด <break/> ชาบูเสียบไม้ที่ร้าน Shabu Express <break/> อาหารเวียดนามที่ร้าน Miss Saigon <break/> หรือจะลองข้าวซอยเหนือที่ร้านอ่องตองข้าวซอยก็อร่อยมากค่ะ <break/> ถ้าคุณชอบอาหารฮาลาลก็มีร้านเนื้อไทยวอกและร้านจีรพันธ์ด้วยนะคะ <break/> ลองเลือกดูเมนูที่ชอบจากร้านเหล่านี้ค่ะ <break/> รับรองว่ามีอะไรน่ากินแน่นอนค่ะ <break/> ถ้าต้องการคำแนะนำเมนูเพิ่มเติม บอกได้นะคะ <break/>

question: ที่ปั๊มบัตรจอดรถ
answer:
ที่ปั๊มบัตรจอดรถ หรือจุดประทับบัตรจอดรถด้วย E-Stamp ที่ The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi มีดังนี้ค่ะ <break/>
- ชั้น M หน้าเคาน์เตอร์ Konvy (Main Information Counter) <break/>
- ชั้น 3 หน้า Starbucks ใกล้โซนโรงหนังและ MCC Hall <break/>
- ชั้น G จุดบริการลูกค้าใกล้ Gourmet Market และทางออกที่จอดรถ <break/>
นอกจากนี้ ถ้าคุณเป็นสมาชิก M Card สามารถนำใบเสร็จจากห้างหรือศูนย์การค้ามาประทับบัตรจอดรถเพื่อร่วมลุ้นรับคะแนน M Point รวม 2 ล้านคะแนนได้ด้วยค่ะ <break/>
ช่วงเวลาร่วมรายการตั้งแต่ 1 มกราคม ถึง 31 ธันวาคม 2569 ค่ะ <break/>
ถ้าคุณต้องการข้อมูลเพิ่มเติมเกี่ยวกับการประทับบัตรจอดรถหรือสิทธิพิเศษอื่น ๆ บอกได้นะคะ <break/>

question: quick reply: The Mall Lifestore Eatventure M Card Dining Rewards
answer:
The Mall Lifestore Eatventure is a special M CARD dining rewards promotion. <break/>
Here’s how it works: <break/>
- Spend 400 Baht at participating restaurants in The Mall Lifestore Ngamwongwan or Bangkapi from Monday to Friday. <break/>
- Earn 1 M STAR per 400 Baht spent, receipts can be combined. <break/>
- You can earn up to 2 M STARs per day and a maximum of 20 M STARs during the campaign. <break/>
- Accumulate M STARs via the M CARD APPLICATION at the shopping center’s redemption points. <break/>
- Redeem your M STARs for various coupons and cash coupons worth up to 500 Baht. <break/>
Rewards include: <break/>
- 3 M STARs: 100 Baht coupon for OHKAJHU or OH! JUICE. <break/>
- 5 M STARs: 100 Baht STARBUCKS coupon. <break/>
- 7 M STARs: 100 Baht SUSHIRO coupon. <break/>
- 10 M STARs: 200 Baht cash coupon for restaurants in the mall. <break/>
- 12 M STARs: YAKINIKU LIKE coupon for Karubi beef or pork. <break/>
- 15 M STARs: 100 Baht coupon for CHAGEE or MOLLY TEA. <break/>
- 17 M STARs: 200 Baht coupon for KATEI SHABU or MK RESTAURANTS. <break/>
- 20 M STARs: 500 Baht cash coupon for restaurants in the mall. <break/>
Coupons can be physical or e-coupons, with different redemption and validity periods. <break/>
The promotion runs from May 15, 2026, to July 15, 2026, with coupon validity extending up to August 15, 2026. <break/>
You must be an M CARD member to join and use the M CARD APPLICATION to accumulate and redeem rewards. <break/>
Enjoy dining and earning rewards! <break/>

question: quick reply: The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi: The Heart of Pride 2026 Celebration
answer:
The Heart of Pride 2026 at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi celebrates Pride Month with a big parade and fun activities. <break/>
The parade, called WE ALL PRIDE THAILAND 2026 @ BANGKAPI, is on June 20, 2026, from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM. <break/>
It starts at the National Institute of Development Administration (NIDA) and ends at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi. <break/>
Over 50 executives and staff from The Mall Group join, along with celebrities and beauty pageant reps, making it colorful and lively. <break/>
In front of the mall, you’ll find THE RAINBOW ROAD with music from 4:00 PM and booths from sponsors and activities. <break/>
Inside the mall, THE CELEBRATION CABARET shows happen at 12:00 PM and 2:00 PM on June 20, celebrating equality and diversity. <break/>
Also, from June 1 to 30, visit the exhibition THE EAST BANGKOK WE NEVER LOOKED AT at M Atrium, G Floor, showcasing the diverse life and stories of Eastern Bangkok residents. <break/>
It’s a joyful, inclusive event full of love, acceptance, and pride! <break/>

question: quick reply: The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi: The Heart of Pride 2026 Celebration
answer:
The Heart of Pride 2026 at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi celebrates Pride Month as the Pride Hub of Eastern Bangkok. <break/>
The main event is the "WE ALL PRIDE THAILAND 2026 @ BANGKAPI" parade on June 20, 2026, from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM. <break/>
The parade starts at the National Institute of Development Administration (NIDA) and ends at The Mall Lifestore Bangkapi. <break/>
Over 50 executives and staff from The Mall Group join, along with celebrities and beauty pageant representatives. <break/>
The area in front of the mall will be decorated with colorful balloon art and a rainbow-themed space called THE RAINBOW ROAD. <break/>
There will be a DUO BAND playing music from 4:00 PM onwards, plus sponsor and activity booths. <break/>
Inside the mall, enjoy THE CELEBRATION CABARET shows at 12:00 PM and 2:00 PM on June 20. <break/>
Also, visit the exhibition "THE EAST BANGKOK WE NEVER LOOKED AT" at M Atrium, G Floor, running all June. <break/>
This exhibition highlights the diverse lifestyles and stories of Eastern Bangkok residents, promoting equality and acceptance. <break/>
It's a joyful, colorful celebration of diversity, inclusion, and pride for everyone to enjoy! <break/>

answer: ที่จอดรถที่เดอะมอลล์บางกะปิมีหลายโซนค่ะ <break/> แนะนำให้สังเกตป้ายโซนที่จอดรถก่อนเข้าค่ะ <break/> ค่าจอดรถทั่วไป วันธรรมดา 3 ชั่วโมงแรกจอดฟรีค่ะ <break/> ชั่วโมงถัดไปคิดชั่วโมงละ 20 บาท <break/> ถ้าจอดเกิน 7 ชั่วโมงขึ้นไป คิดชั่วโมงละ 50 บาทค่ะ <break/> วันหยุดเสาร์-อาทิตย์ 1-2 ชั่วโมงแรกจอดฟรี <break/> และชั่วโมงถัดไปคิด 20 บาท <break/> มีที่จอดรถสำหรับผู้หญิงโดยเฉพาะ พร้อมเจ้าหน้าที่รักษาความปลอดภัยและกล้องวงจรปิด 24 ชั่วโมงด้วยค่ะ <break/> สมาชิก M Card ระดับ Scarlet หรือ Platinum จะได้รับสิทธิ์จอดรถฟรีเพิ่มอีก 2-4 ชั่วโมง และสามารถจองที่จอดรถล่วงหน้าผ่านแอปได้ที่บางสาขาค่ะ <break/> หากใช้บริการโรงหนังหรือ Fitness First จะได้สิทธิ์จอดรถฟรีเพิ่มอีก 2-4 ชั่วโมงด้วยค่ะ <break/> โปรดเก็บบัตรจอดรถหรือคิวอาร์โค้ดไว้สแกนก่อนออกเพื่อความสะดวกค่ะ <break/> มีค่าปรับจอดรถค้างคืนหลัง 2:30 น. ประมาณ 250-500 บาทค่ะ <break/> หวังว่าข้อมูลนี้จะช่วยคุณได้นะคะ <break/>

question: quick reply: MAGIC DISCOUNT: Instant Savings & Double Points
answer:
The MAGIC DISCOUNT promotion offers M Card members instant savings and double reward points across three phases:

1. Phase 1 (June 1 - June 30, 2026):  
- Up to 400 Baht discount by redeeming 800 M Points for 200 Baht discount.  
- Participating categories: SPORT, FASHION SPORTS, BEAUTY, LIFESTYLE.  
- Limit 1,600 M Points and 400 Baht discount per M Card number for the period.

2. Phase 2 (July 1 - July 31, 2026):  
- 200 Baht discount by redeeming 800 M Points for 200 Baht discount.  
- Participating category: CAFE & RESTAURANT.  
- Limit 800 M Points and 200 Baht discount per M Card number for the period.

3. Phase 3 (August 1 - September 15, 2026):  
- Up to 600 Baht discount by redeeming 800 M Points for 200 Baht discount.  
- Participating categories: IT, EDUCATION, BEAUTY SERVICE, FURNITURE.  
- Limit 2,400 M Points and 600 Baht discount per M Card number for the period.

To redeem, inform staff of your phone number, membership card number, national ID linked to M Card, or show M Card App barcode before payment. Tell staff to use "MAGIC DISCOUNT" promotion. You can earn and use points equal to purchase amount for discounts at participating stores.

Terms include:  
- Cannot exchange for cash or combine with other promotions.  
- Points credited within 24 hours.  
- Spending must be over 1 Baht after discount.  
- Company reserves rights to change conditions or disqualify fraud.

Enjoy your savings and double points! <break/>  
For more details, ask at the point of sale or call M Card Call Center 02-789-5555. <break/>

answer:

question: banner: THE MALL LIFESTORE EATVENTURE
answer:
THE MALL LIFESTORE EATVENTURE is a promotion for M CARD members dining at participating restaurants in The Mall Lifestore Ngamwongwan and Bangkapi branches. <break/> Here’s how it works: <break/>

- Spend 400 Baht or more on Monday to Friday at participating restaurants to earn 1 M STAR per receipt (receipts can be combined). <break/>
- You can earn up to 2 M STARs per day and a maximum of 20 M STARs throughout the campaign. <break/>
- M STARs are collected and redeemed via the M CARD APPLICATION at the shopping center's redemption counter. <break/>

You can redeem your M STARs for various rewards: <break/>
- 3 M STARs for a 100 Baht OHKAJHU or OH JUICE coupon. <break/>
- 5 M STARs for a 100 Baht Starbucks coupon. <break/>
- 12 M STARs for a free Yakiniku Like coupon (Karubi Beef 50g or Karubi Pork 50g). <break/>
- 17 M STARs for a 200 Baht KATEI SHABU or MK Restaurants coupon. <break/>
- 20 M STARs for a 500 Baht Cash Coupon usable at participating restaurants. <break/>

The promotion runs from May 15, 2026, to July 15, 2026, with some coupons valid until August 15, 2026. <break/>

Terms include dine-in only, excluding take-home orders, food delivery, e-wallet payments, and certain receipts. <break/> Handwritten receipts must have the store name, receipt number, and store stamp. <break/>

Participating restaurants include OHKAJHU, OH JUICE, Starbucks, Sushiro, Yakiniku Like, Chagee, Molly Tea, Katei Shabu, and MK Restaurants. <break/>

If you want to join, just use your M CARD and enjoy dining at these restaurants during weekdays to collect your M STARs! <break/> Would you like details on how to redeem or the specific terms? <break/>

answer:

question: banner: THE MALL LIFESTORE SPORTS FEST
answer:
THE MALL LIFESTORE SPORTS FEST is a fun and active sports shopping festival at The Mall Lifestore Bangkae, located at M FASHION HALL 1, Ground Floor. <break/> It runs from June 5 to June 10, 2026. <break/> You can shop new collections from top sports brands like ADIDAS, ANTA, ARI FOOTBALL, CROCS, DECATHLON, JD SPORTS, NEW BALANCE, SKECHERS, and more with discounts up to 60%! <break/> There are exciting activities too, such as interactive football games, VR football shooting, and fast-paced Subsoccer games for all ages. <break/> 

Also, from June 1 to June 30, 2026, M CARD members get 5 times M POINTS when shopping at participating sports stores in The Mall Lifestore branches and The Mall Korat. <break/> You must spend at least 1,000 Baht per day and can earn points up to 3,000 Baht per day, with a maximum of 2 redemptions per person during the campaign. <break/> Points are credited within 24 hours and can be accumulated via the M CARD app or by showing your M CARD number at stores. <break/> 

This promotion excludes some items like alcohol, cigarettes, gift cards, and online orders. <break/> For more details, you can contact the M Card Call Center at 02-789-5555. <break/> It's a great chance to enjoy sporty shopping and earn extra rewards! <break/>

question: banner: THE MALL LIFESTORE SPORTS FEST
answer:
THE MALL LIFESTORE SPORTS FEST is a fun and active sports shopping festival at The Mall Lifestore Bangkae, located at M FASHION HALL 1, Ground Floor. <break/> It runs from June 5 to June 10, 2026. <break/> You can shop new collections from top sports brands like ADIDAS, ANTA, ARI FOOTBALL, CROCS, DECATHLON, JD SPORTS, NEW BALANCE, SKECHERS, and more, with discounts up to 60%! <break/> There are exciting activities too, such as interactive football games, VR football shooting, and fast-paced sub-soccer games for all ages. <break/> 

Also, from June 1 to June 30, 2026, M CARD members get 5 times M POINTS when shopping at participating sports stores on Mondays to Thursdays. <break/> You must spend at least 1,000 Baht per day and can earn points up to 3,000 Baht per day, with a total limit of 1,200,000 points for the campaign. <break/> Points are accumulated by uploading receipts on the same day via the M CARD app or showing your M CARD number at stores. <break/> 

This promotion is valid at all The Mall Lifestore branches and The Mall Korat, including many sports stores like ADIDAS, ANTA, ARI FOOTBALL, DECATHLON, JD SPORTS, NEW BALANCE, SKECHERS, and WARRIX. <break/> 

Enjoy shopping, fun activities, and great rewards during this sporty festival! <break/> If you want, I can share more details about specific brands or activities. <break/>

question: banner: M Card Spend at Mall Get M Points by Scanning Receipts
answer:
You can earn M Points easily by scanning your receipts when you spend at The Mall and The Mall Life Store shopping centers. <break/> Here’s how it works: <break/> 

- Get 1 M Point for every 25 Baht spent at most stores. <break/> 
- For IT, gadget, furniture, beauty clinic, and education institute groups, earn 1 M Point for every 50 Baht spent (excluding TRUE / DTAC stores). <break/> 
- You must scan receipts on the same day and at the same branch where you shopped. <break/> 
- Upload one receipt per image; you cannot combine bills. <break/> 
- You can upload up to 5 receipts at a time. <break/> 
- There is a limit of 10 receipts per day and a maximum total purchase of 20,000 Baht per month per M Card membership number. <break/> 
- Receipts must be clear, showing store name, date, time, receipt number, and net amount. <break/> 
- Receipts must be from shopping center opening hours (10:00 - 22:30) and uploaded on the same day, no later than 22:30. <break/> 
- Some exclusions apply, like department store sections, alcoholic beverages, medicines, vouchers, online orders, and more. <break/> 
- Points will be credited to your M Card account within 24 hours after uploading. <break/> 

You can scan receipts via the M Card App, LINE @MCard, or LINE @TheMallGroup by selecting the Scan Receipt option. <break/> 

If you want more details or help, you can call the M Card Call Center at 02-789-5555. <break/> 

Enjoy collecting your M Points easily while shopping! <break/>
